ai_profile:
**Pinkpop 2026 Festival Profile**  
Taking place from June 19-21, 2026, Pinkpop continues its legacy as a vibrant celebration of music, bringing together 32 artists from across the globe. This year’s lineup leans heavily into Alternative Rock (8 artists), Pop (7), and Indie Rock (6), while also showcasing a diverse array of genres like Electropop, Punk Rock, and even Rave Rock. With every act boasting Spotify links, audiences can easily explore the rich musical tapestry that Pinkpop promises to deliver.

The festival demonstrates an impressive geographical spread, with artists hailing from eight countries. The United Kingdom and the United States dominate the roster with nine acts each, while the Netherlands proudly represents with seven. Other nations such as Germany, Canada, and Sweden add to the festival’s international flavor. Gender representation remains a work in progress, with 20 male-led acts compared to eight female-fronted ones and four mixed-gender acts.

While Pinkpop 2026 showcases a wide variety of musical styles and global talent, the diversity in terms of artists of color is notably limited, with only one act represented. Nonetheless, the festival’s average artist rating of 6.88 suggests a solid lineup, with nearly 70% of acts scoring a rating of 7 or higher. As always, Pinkpop promises an eclectic and exciting experience for music lovers of all tastes.
